5. Ram: KINGSTON VALUE RAM SERIES 8GB (1 X 8GB) DDR4 2666 MHZ C19 x2

7. Power Supply: Cooler Master MasterWatt 750
8. SSD: Samsung 970EVO Plus 500GB
9. Case: ANTEC P8 TEMPERED GLASS ATX
